# Olympia Treasury — Protocol-Controlled Vault for Ethereum Classic

## About

The Olympia Treasury is an immutable, protocol-controlled vault that receives EIP-1559 basefee revenue and disburses funds through on-chain governance. It is non-inflationary — no new ETC coins are minted. All funds come from existing transaction fees.

## Key Features

- Protocol-level basefee accumulation (EIP-1559)
- On-chain governance-controlled disbursement
- Immutable contract — no proxy patterns, no admin methods
- Timelock-protected execution
- Sanctions-checked withdrawals
- Fully auditable and transparent

## Contract

- Treasury: 0x035b2e3c189B772e52F4C3DA6c45c84A3bB871bf
- Executor: 0x64624f74f77639cba268a6c8bedc2778b707ef9a
- Network: Mordor Testnet (Chain ID 63) + ETC Mainnet (Chain ID 61)
- Version: Demo v0.2

## Fund Allocation

- Developer Retention
- Infrastructure Maintenance
- Emergency Response
- Public Goods

## Authors

- Cody Burns (github.com/realcodywburns)
